'''鈭歨-dh-y-r''' ('''kahadhyeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calorise|calorise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-dh-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calorise|calorise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-dh-y-r
|-
! Lemma
| kahadhyeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihadhyeroko|thihadhyeroko]] || [[word:jihadhyeroko|jihadhyeroko]] || [[word:shihadhyeroko|shihadhyeroko]] || [[word:kihadhyeroko|kihadhyeroko]]
|-

|-
